meta.subtitle: Command Center
meta.description: Secure, real-time coordination for private investigation and surveillance teams — from the first lead to the final report.

home.hero: Run every surveillance operation from one command center.
home.subhero: Detective Pulse unifies live agent tracking, case management, evidence, AI reporting and emergency response into a single secure, mobile-first platform.
home.footer: Detective Pulse Operations Command Center · Built for field teams

gps.title: Live GPS Tracking
gps.desc: Real-time field positions refreshed every 60 seconds with battery and status.

agents.title: Agent Management
agents.desc: Roster, availability board and field status across your whole team.

ai.title: AI Report Generator
ai.desc: Turn raw timeline logs into a professional surveillance report in seconds.

sos.title: Emergency SOS
sos.desc: One-tap distress alerts that instantly notify supervisors with location.

ops.title: Operations Dashboard
ops.desc: Cases, missions, expenses and alerts unified into one command view.

security.title: Secure by Design
security.desc: Row-level security, RBAC, audit logging and encrypted storage.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your Thai mobile number to receive a 6-digit SMS code.
login.phoneHint: Thai mobile number (+66). We'll send a 6-digit code by SMS.

verify.title: Verify Your Identity
verify.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to your phone.

auth.brandDescription: Secure, real-time coordination for private investigation and surveillance teams — from the first lead to the final report.

emergencyBanner.review: Click to review and dispatch a response.

cases.title: Case Management
cases.noDescription: Open your first case to begin tracking a surveillance operation.

intake.title: AI Case Intake
intake.description: Upload documents and photos — AI extracts the case intelligence for your review.
intake.dropTitle: Drop files here or click to upload
intake.dropHint: PDF, TXT, JPG, PNG, WEBP — up to 20 files
intake.rejectedTypes: {count} file(s) skipped — unsupported type. Convert HEIC/DOCX/DOC to PDF or JPG.
intake.analyzingHint: Extracting intelligence from {count} file(s). This can take a moment.
intake.analyzeFailed: AI analysis failed — please try again.
intake.name: Name

detail.reportingHint: Generate a professional AI surveillance report from the {count} logged timeline entry.
detail.reportingHintPlural: Generate a professional AI surveillance report from the {count} logged timeline entries.
detail.noTimelineDescription: Add the first surveillance observation above.
detail.noEvidenceDescription: Upload photos, videos or PDF files for this case.
detail.noReportsDescription: Use "Generate AI Report" to create one from the timeline.
detail.noExpensesDescription: No expenses have been recorded for this case yet.

closeCase.title: Close this case
closeCase.description: Mark the case as closed and set the end date. This action can be reversed by reopening the case.
closeCase.checkNotDone: Not done — you can still close

gpsSection.title: GPS Devices
gpsSection.noDevices: No GPS devices on this case.

createDialog.title: Open a new case
createDialog.description: Record the client, target and surveillance parameters.

editDialog.title: Edit case
editDialog.piiNote: Target identity fields (name, phone, vehicle, address) are encrypted and must be updated via a separate secure process.

gps.addDescription: Register a GPS tracking device for this case. All fields are optional.

fields.linkedAgentHint: GPS903 pings for this IMEI will update this agent's position on the Live Map.
fields.gps903DeviceIdHint: Integer device ID from the GPS903 platform. Required for Live Map polling.

deleteDialog.title: ยืนยันการลบ GPS
deleteDialog.message: คุณต้องการลบอุปกรณ์ GPS นี้หรือไม่
deleteDialog.irreversible: การดำเนินการนี้ไม่สามารถย้อนกลับได้

toast.imeiCopied: คัดลอก IMEI แล้ว
toast.simCopied: คัดลอกเบอร์ซิมแล้ว

gpsSection.title: GPS Tracker Information
gpsSection.noDevices: No GPS devices registered for this case.

agents.title: Agent Management
agents.noDescription: Create your first field operative to start tracking operations.

detail.noTimeline: No timeline entries for this agent

createDialog.title: Create field agent
createDialog.description: Add an operative to the roster. Status and live position can be updated later.

editDialog.title: Edit agent
editDialog.description: Update operative details. Agent ID is immutable:

fields.userPhonePlaceholder: Leave blank to keep current link
fields.photoHint: JPG, PNG or WebP · max 5 MB

timeline.title: Timeline Reporting
timeline.description: Chronological surveillance log across all cases.
timeline.noDescription: Field observations submitted by agents will appear here.

addEntry.entryPlaceholder: e.g. Target left residence heading north on foot.

filters.noResultsDescription: Try a different search, agent, or date range.

entry.unsavedWarning: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?
entry.deleteConfirm: Delete this timeline entry? This cannot be undone.

ai.quickEntryPlaceholder: e.g. 10:15 target left residence heading north
ai.parseSuccess: Entry parsed — review and adjust before saving

evidence.title: Evidence Management
evidence.description: Secure photo, video and document storage across cases.
evidence.noDescription: Evidence uploaded to cases will be organised here.

filters.noResultsDescription: Try a different search or file type.

expenses.title: Expense Management
expenses.noDescription: Submit your first field expense to start tracking.

actions.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently hide the record. This cannot be undone.

capture.title: Scan Receipt
capture.takePhotoHint: Open camera — analyzed instantly with AI
capture.chooseGalleryHint: Select an existing image — analyzed with AI
capture.confidenceLow: Low confidence — please review all fields carefully
capture.confidenceMed: Some fields may be inaccurate — double-check before saving

toast.scanError: Could not read receipt — please check the image or enter manually

filters.noResultsDescription: Try a different search, category, or date range.

messages.noMessagesDescription: Post an update or internal note. Updates are visible to the client; internal notes are staff-only.
messages.composePlaceholder: Write an update or internal note...

portal.title: Updates
portal.noMessagesDescription: Our team will post case updates here. You can also send us a message.
portal.replyPlaceholder: Send a message to the team...

payroll.title: Agent Payroll
payroll.description: Daily payments owed to investigators and partners.
payroll.myDescription: Your work days, pending payments, and payment history.
payroll.noDescription: Create the first daily payment entry above.
payroll.noOwnDescription: Your payment records will appear here.

reports.title: Report Generator
reports.description: Select a case and date range, then generate a Thai, English, or Internal surveillance report from timeline entries.
reports.caseSearchPlaceholder: Search by case number or client…
reports.noCasesAssignedDescription: You have no assigned cases to generate reports for.
reports.noCasesDescription: Create a case first before generating reports.
reports.rangeError: Start date must be on or before end date.

emergency.title: Emergency Alert System
emergency.description: Field distress signals and response coordination.
emergency.noDescription: All clear. SOS alerts from the field will appear here in real time.

sos.dialogDescription: This immediately notifies all supervisors with your current GPS location. Use only in a genuine emergency.

gps903Discovery.title: GPS903 Device Discovery
gps903Discovery.description: Automatically discover and import all GPS devices from your GPS903 account.
gps903Discovery.emptyHint: Click Sync Devices to discover all GPS devices registered in your GPS903 account.

importDialog.title: Attach to Case
importDialog.description: Link to a case and optionally assign an agent.

gpsDevices.title: GPS Devices
gpsDevices.description: Live status of all GPS903-connected devices and their linked agents.
gpsDevices.emptyHint: Open a case, add a GPS tracker, set the provider to GPS903, enter the Device ID, and link it to an agent.
gpsDevices.pollingNote: Positions update every minute via GPS903 polling. Live Map updates in real time via Supabase Realtime.

detail.noHistory: No location history in the last 48 hours.
detail.noAgentHistory: Link an agent to this device to see location history.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Movement intelligence from the last 7 days of field data.
analytics.noData: No GPS pings recorded for this agent on this date.
analytics.noHeatData: No location data found for the selected period.
analytics.noApiKey: Google Maps API key not configured.

map.title: Live Map
map.description: Real-time field positions, auto-refreshed every 60 seconds.
map.noApiKeyDescription: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY to enable the live tracking map. Agent positions below are still synced from the database.
map.trailNote: Trail shown automatically when an agent is selected

fence.name: Fence name
fence.clickToStart: Click on the map to place the first point
fence.clickToAdd: {count} points — keep clicking to add more

popup.noPhone: ไม่พบหมายเลขโทรศัพท์ของ Agent

clients.title: Clients
clients.noDescription: Clients are linked to cases and can access approved reports through the portal.

detail.portalActive: Active — client can log in to the portal

createDialog.title: Create client
createDialog.description: Add a new client record. Link a portal account afterwards from the client detail page.

users.title: User Management
users.description: Manage roles and permissions across the platform.
users.roleNote: Role changes take effect immediately and are recorded in the audit log.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.description: Immutable record of system activity for compliance and security.
audit.noDescription: Database changes will be recorded here automatically.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.aboutText: Detective Pulse Operations Command Center · v1.0.0
settings.aboutDescription: Built with Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI and Supabase. Secured with Row Level Security, RBAC and audit logging.
settings.aiPromptsLinkHint: Edit system prompts for report generation
settings.aiPromptsDescription: Customize the system prompts sent to Claude when generating surveillance reports. Changes take effect immediately — no redeploy needed.
settings.aiPromptsSecurityNote: Security note: Prompts must always instruct Claude to respond with strict JSON.
settings.aiPromptsEmpty: No AI prompts found. Run the database migration to seed the default prompts.

promptEditor.savedToast: Prompt saved — takes effect on next report generation.
promptEditor.resetConfirm: Reset to the default prompt? Your current text will be saved to version history.
promptEditor.restoreConfirm: Restore this version as the active prompt?

delete.title: Delete account
delete.description: Permanently delete your account and personal profile data. Case records you contributed are kept by the case owner but unlinked from you. This cannot be undone.
delete.confirmDescription: This permanently removes your login and personal profile. You will be signed out immediately.

login.title: Access your portal
login.subtitle: Enter your registered mobile number to receive a verification code.

portal.subtitle: Track your cases and manage invoices.
portal.overdueAlert: You have {count} overdue invoice(s) totalling {total}. Please contact us to arrange payment.

cases.title: My Cases
cases.noCasesDescription: Your cases will appear here once opened by your account manager.

portal.noInvoicesDescription: Invoices issued for your engagements will be listed here.
portal.notLinkedDescription: Your account has not been linked to a client profile yet. Please contact your account manager.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.description: Billing and payment tracking for client engagements.
invoices.noDescription: Create your first invoice to start billing clients.

recordPayment.title: Record Payment
recordPayment.description: Log how and when this invoice was settled.

createDialog.title: Create invoice
createDialog.description: Bill a client for a completed surveillance engagement.

editDialog.title: Edit Invoice
editDialog.description: Update invoice details. Amount is recalculated from line items.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Invoice
deleteConfirm.description: This invoice will be soft-deleted and hidden from all views. Type DELETE to confirm.

assignAgents.title: Assign Agents
assignAgents.description: Select the field agents to assign to this case.
assignAgents.notLinked: No login account — can't be assigned
assignAgents.nAssigned: {count, plural, =0 {No agents} one {# agent} other {# agents}}

field.noAgent: Your account is not linked to a field agent profile. Ask an admin to link your account.

log.title: New timeline entry
log.description: Log an observation to a case timeline.

locations.title: Locations
locations.label: Custom Label
locations.notesPlaceholder: Gate code, security, best vantage point…
locations.name: Location Name
locations.mapsUrlPlaceholder: Paste a Google Maps or maps.app.goo.gl link
locations.coordsNotFound: Could not extract coordinates — URL will be stored for navigation

documents.title: Reference Documents
documents.uploadDescription: Images, PDFs, and documents for reference during the operation.
documents.notesPlaceholder: e.g. ID card scan, property deed
documents.deleteDescription: will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

gps903Credentials.title: GPS903 Credentials
gps903Credentials.description: Per-device IMEI credentials for GPS903 polling. Each device logs in independently.
gps903Credentials.emptyHint: Add at least one device credential to enable GPS polling and map display.

row.testLoginOnly: Login succeeded — enter Device ID manually via Edit
row.deleteConfirm: Delete credential for "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

form.testResult: Login OK · Device ID #{id} detected · {lat}, {lng} · {speed} km/h · {battery}% battery
form.noDeviceIdHint: The device won't be polled until a Device ID is detected or entered.
form.activeHint: Inactive devices are excluded from the polling cron.
form.imeiRequiredToast: Enter a valid 15-digit IMEI before testing
form.passwordRequiredToast: Enter the device password before testing
form.testLoginOnlyToast: Login succeeded — enter Device ID manually
form.deviceIdInvalidToast: Device ID must be a positive number

gpsMonitor.title: GPS Monitor
gpsMonitor.descriptionAgent: GPS trackers assigned to your cases.
gpsMonitor.descriptionStaff: Live GPS device positions across all active cases.
gpsMonitor.noDevices: No GPS devices on your cases.
gpsMonitor.noApiKey: Google Maps API key not configured (NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY).

root.title: Something went wrong
root.description: An unexpected error occurred while loading the application. Please try again.

generic.title: Unable to load this section
generic.description: Something went wrong while loading this page. You can retry, or come back in a moment.

portal.title: Something went wrong
portal.description: We couldn't load this page right now. Please try again, or contact us if the problem continues.

lock.title: App locked
lock.subtitle: Enter your PIN to continue
lock.useCode: Sign out and use a code

settings.title: App lock (PIN)
settings.descriptionOn: Your app is locked with a PIN. Enter it when you open the app.
settings.descriptionOff: Set a PIN to lock the app — no SMS code each time, just your PIN.
